content_body: We are a group of friends from Atlanta - 5 couples. We were looking for a quick getaway from the rat race of the city. This was all of our first time to the mountains. I cannot tell you how impressed we are! Words just cannot do this cabin justice. We were all in need of a little R&R and Fallen Timer was just what the doctor ordered. The view of the river was awesome. We took a hike to enjoy the outdoor atmosphere and we loved it. The furniture and amenities were fantastic and perfect for our visit. I cannot wait to share my experience with all of my friends at home. I am sad that the weekend is almost over and I have to go back to reality. We are already planning our next trip back. Thank you!
title: North Georgia Mountain Couples Retreat
